🟡 NEAR-TERM: 2 defect(s) require attention within 90 days.

work_order.description: URGENT: Pole inspection identified 3 defects including 1 serious issue(s) requiring immediate attention.
work_order.long_description:
POLE INSPECTION FINDINGS

1. Transformer Corrosion [SERIOUS]
   MVI Confidence: 95.00%
   Description: MVI detected transformer corrosion with 95.0% confidence
   Action: Inspect and address transformer corrosion as needed
   Standards: NESC 2023 Rule 214A (Equipment Maintenance)

2. Crossarm Decay [OTHER_THAN_SERIOUS]
   MVI Confidence: 87.00%
   Description: MVI detected crossarm decay with 87.0% confidence
   Action: Inspect and address crossarm decay as needed
   Standards: NESC 2023 Rule 261 (Strength Requirements)

3. Hardware Corrosion [OTHER_THAN_SERIOUS]
   MVI Confidence: 82.00%
   Description: MVI detected hardware corrosion with 82.0% confidence
   Action: Inspect and address hardware corrosion as needed
   Standards: NESC 2023 Rule 261 (Strength Requirements)
